name: pebble
description: > _Drop a pebble. Watch your savings ripple._

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,FE,READY" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "bash backend/scripts/start_db.sh && cd backend && cargo run" "cd frontend && npm run dev -- --open" "wait-on tcp:localhost:3000 tcp:localhost:5173 && node scripts/dev-ready.js"
